title: The Legends Were True
description:
Entering into a pitch dark chamber, a sudden light pierces the darkness from above, just as the door slams behind you.

Illuminated before you appears to be a podium with a map on it. You feel compelled to take it.

Suspicious.
conditions: All players must have at least 1 card in deck
All players must have at least 10 HP
notes: Taking the map leads to a safe exit. Refusing to take the map causes the chamber to collapse, forcing you to navigate in darkness but providing a potion reward. The Spoils Map is a unique card that reveals enemy information.
